pkgmetadata.longdescription: svgelements is a Python library for SVG parsing and generation. It provides a comprehensive set of SVG element classes that allow manipulation of SVG paths, shapes, transforms, colors, and other SVG constructs. The library is designed to be lightweight and standalone with no external dependencies.
svgelements是一个用于SVG解析和生成的Python库。它提供了一套全面的SVG元素类， 允许操作SVG路径、形状、变换、颜色和其他SVG构造。该库设计为轻量级且独立运行， 无需外部依赖。
